tasks.subject: Task 1: Create PackageEventGroup.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New component that renders one package group: a clickable header row showing the most recent event, and — when expanded — an indented list of child event rows.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/components/PackageEventGroup.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Collapsed header shows: expand arrow (▶, rotates 90° when expanded with 0.15s CSS transition), 24×24 glyph icon colour-coded by `events[0].type`, package name (bold, truncated), "N events" pill, right-aligned relative timestamp
- [ ] Second line shows `events[0].what` with `on repo/arch` suffix stripped (subtitle)
- [ ] Third line shows scope chip (same style as EventRow) and project path in monospace muted
- [ ] Clicking anywhere on the header emits `toggle`
- [ ] When `expanded` is true, indented child rows appear below the header
- [ ] Each child row is an `<a>` linking to `event.url`; shows 20×20 glyph + connector line (omitted on last child) + eventTitle() + optional repo/arch code line + right-aligned timestamp
- [ ] Expanded group has `background: var(--bg-card-2)`, `border: 1px solid var(--border)`, `border-radius: 9px`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` → exits 0 with no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/PackageEventGroup.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Collapsed header: arrow + 24×24 glyph + package name + count badge + timestamp", "Second line: subtitle (what stripped of repo/arch)", "Third line: scope chip + project path", "Header click emits toggle", "Expanded: indented child rows with 20×20 glyphs and connector lines", "Each child is an <a> to event.url", "Expanded group has bg-card-2 + border frame", "vue-tsc --noEmit exits 0"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Integrate grouped mode into EventLog.vue
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the `⊞ Group` toggle button, `groupedMode` state, `groupedEvents` computed, `expandedGroups` map, and conditional rendering so the event log can switch between flat and grouped views.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/EventLog.vue`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `⊞ Group` button appears right of Filter button; purple-tinted when active, neutral when inactive
- [ ] Flat mode unchanged: EventRow rows, "N in window" count
- [ ] Grouped mode: one PackageEventGroup per project/package, ordered newest-first in Today/Yesterday/Earlier buckets
- [ ] Header count reads "N packages in window" in grouped mode
- [ ] Clicking a group header toggles it expanded/collapsed
- [ ] Active filters work in grouped mode: group shown if ≥1 event passes; header always shows events[0]; count badge shows total
- [ ] Expand state survives SSE unshift() but resets on new fetch (array identity change)
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` exits 0

**Verify:** `cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit` → exits 0 with no output

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/EventLog.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npx vue-tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Group button appears, purple-tinted when active", "Flat mode unchanged", "Grouped mode: one row per package in Today/Yesterday/Earlier buckets", "Header count: N packages in window", "Click header toggles expand", "Filters work in grouped mode", "Expand state survives SSE but resets on fetch", "vue-tsc --noEmit exits 0"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
